zombiecoder-mcp-http.note: This is the HTTP transport for the ZombieCoder MCP server. It is used by VS Code, Cursor, and Windsurf.

vscode.note: Copy into your VS Code MCP client settings (if your MCP client supports HTTP transport).

cursor.note: Copy into Cursor MCP settings. Ensure it supports HTTP-based MCP; otherwise use the app UI endpoints directly.

windsurf.note: Copy into Windsurf MCP settings or use the /api/mcp/config endpoint from this app.
